summary: Frontend-only mobile Voice regression testing completed. Suggestion-driven AI responses and task-creation status notice behavior were validated; intermittent Expo preview outages caused one partial rerun failure.

integration_issues.issue: Public preview intermittently returned 'The preview environment is not responding' / 502 during rerun, temporarily blocking Voice screen load.

issues: Voice replies toggle chip appears below recommended 44px tap target height on mobile.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning observed: useNativeDriver not supported on web runtime; falls back to JS animation.
Console warning observed: props.pointerEvents is deprecated; use style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Stabilize Expo/ngrok preview tunnel to reduce flaky UI test runs and false negatives.
Review small interactive controls on Voice screen to ensure 44x44 minimum touch targets.
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceScreen regression scope is functionally aligned: suggestion buttons still call sendTextMessage and preserve AI response rendering while task success now also shows non-blocking voice-status-notice.
Response fallback logic (buildFallbackReply) protects against empty backend text and keeps result card/speech flow populated.
VoiceScreen file is moderate size (~550 lines) and still maintainable for current scope; no immediate split required.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of requested feature checks passed when preview was reachable; environment flakiness observed

seed_data_creation: Suggestion 'Remind me to call Mom at 5pm' created a task through normal app flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on mobile viewport 375x667: task suggestion produced transcription + non-empty AI response + task-created badge + voice-status-notice and UI remained tappable after response. Additional suggestion also produced non-empty AI response and rendered result card. One rerun failed only due preview outage.
rca_of_issue: Primary intermittent failure is environmental: Expo public tunnel instability (ngrok disconnect/502/preview-not-responding) intermittently prevents page load. Core Voice feature behavior succeeded on reachable runs.
test_credentials: Not applicable for this frontend scope. /app/memory/test_credentials.md requirement did not apply since no auth flow was tested.
